svg.title: Avbilder user site Azure resources
svg.desc: Resource relationship diagram for the Avbilder customer site hosted on Azure Static Web Apps with managed Functions, Storage, ACS Email, Application Insights, Log Analytics, DNS, Azure DevOps, Managed Identity, and Key Vault.
svg.text: Customer-facing Static Web Apps Free site, managed API, data store, email, telemetry, DNS, and deployment identity.
